privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Docker CLI wrapper script. The wrapper is stored at /home/ga/projects/tools/db-migrate and invokes the acme-migrator:latest Docker image. The image is built from a minimal Python script that validates Docker integration. The wrapper mounts /home/ga/projects/myapp as /app in the container and must connect to the acme-net network to reach the acme-db service for database connectivity testing. All metadata values are accurate and match the task implementation.
